g.text: Render the selected file's cycle diff (objective)
select model file F in the rail
A cycle counts ONLY if it actually changed F —
its CycleDiff for key(F) has a non-empty added
A file merely present unchanged in a cycle's
before/after snapshot does NOT make the list.
text("This diagram didn't change in any cycle")
text("No rendered diff — run the render pipeline")
shared neutral / added green / removed red (text)
text("Diff available after the cycle closes")
